facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past Chùa Sùng Đức. Their loss. This Buddhist temple sits quietly in Khu 1, Phú Quốc, while the resort crowds stay glued to the beach strip. 4.4 stars across 112 reviews. That score comes from people who actually stopped. Step inside, slow down, and watch the island feel completely different. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Incense smoke rising. Courtyard totally empty. Chùa Sùng Đức is the Phu Quoc stop most tourists never make, and the 112 people who rated it 4.4 stars are not complaining.

instagram.caption: Tourists walk past Chùa Sùng Đức every day. 112 reviews, 4.4 stars. Worth the detour. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Empty courtyard. Incense smoke. Chùa Sùng Đức hits different when the beach crowds disappear.

tiktok.caption: The Phu Quoc temple tourists skip every day. Chùa Sùng Đức. 4.4★ 112 reviews. Go. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel
